prompt: Show me the 15 highest 24-hour-volume Polymarket markets ending after May 15, 2026 — explicitly exclude tonight's NBA, NHL, MLB, EPL, and UFC games. Chart each market's 24h volume next to its current implied YES probability so I can see what the wider, multi-week market is actually trading.
expectedReason: homepage showcase categorical charts need multi-row comparisons
responsePreview:
Based on data from a past query, I was able to identify several high-volume multi-week markets ending after May 15, 2026. However, the execution loop exhausted its budget before returning a terminal answer for the "top 15" ranked strictly by 24-hour volume due to validation errors in the primary ranking tool. Consequently, the list below includes prominent multi-week markets found via search, though most only provided cumulative (total) volume rather than 24-hour specific metrics.

### High-Volume Multi-Week Markets (Partial Results)

| Market Title | End Date | Volume (Total/24h) | Implied Probability (YES) |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **What will happen before GTA VI?** | Multi-week | $31,777.97 (24h) | 48.5% |
| **Will France win the 2026 FIFA World Cup?** | 2026-07-20 | $22,790,083.31 (Total) | 16.45% |
| **Will Spain win the 2026 FIFA World Cup?** | 2026-07-20 | $17,926,103.71 (Total) | 15.25% |
| **MLB World Series Champion 2026** | 2026-10-31 | $17,241,248.76 (Total) | 0.75% (Diamondbacks) |
| **Will Portugal win the 2026 FIFA World Cup?** | 2026-07-20 | $16,877,295.20 (Total) | 7.35% |
| **Will Netherlands win the 2026 FIFA World Cup?** | 2026-07-20 | $16,250,014.18 (T...
